items.title: Aave files emergency motion to lift restraining notice on frozen ETH
items.summary: Aave argued that a thief doesn’t gain lawful ownership of property by stealing it and that Gerstein Harrow’s legal argument “defies logic, common sense and the law.”

items.title: Polygon rolls out private stablecoin payments targeting institutions
items.summary: The new wallet feature hides senders, receivers and amounts onchain while maintaining compliance through know your transaction screening and auditable files.

items.title: Bitcoin turns risk on as stocks hit new highs and miner profits rise: Is $85K BTC next?
items.summary: Bitcoin’s recent rally to $80,000 amid improving BTC miner and options markets metrics could create a clear path to $85,000.

items.title: Bitcoin bounces around $80K as Iran strike unsettles crypto, risk assets
items.summary: Bitcoin faced new volatility and a new struggle to reclaim $80,000 as Iran events added pressure to crypto and risk assets.

items.title: SEC delays prediction market ETFs over mechanics and risk concerns: Report
items.summary: The regulator reportedly requested more information from Roundhill, GraniteShares and Bitwise about how the event contract funds would work.

items.title: New York forces Uphold to pay $5M over fraudulent crypto investment scheme
items.summary: New York AG Letitia James secured a $5 million settlement from Uphold for promoting CredEarn, a crypto savings product that misled users about its risks.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: Bitcoin used to hate inflation. Now it might be the opposite
items.summary: Bitcoin is rallying alongside inflation signals, defying the traditional macro playbook.

items.title: Ripple to share North Korean threat intelligence with crypto firms
items.summary: Ripple said April's $285 million Drift breach revealed a new pattern of long-cycle social engineering replacing traditional smart contract exploits.

items.title: Bitcoin crosses $81,000, ETH, SOL, DOGE steady as options desks bid on further price jump
items.summary: Bitcoin is back above $80,000 after Monday's brief reversal on the disputed Iran missile claim, with options markets quietly setting up for a breakout even as skew still favors downside protection.

items.title: XRP slips below $1.40 on heavy volume, tightening range puts breakout in focus
items.summary: High-volume breakdown reset positioning, but compression between $1.38–$1.44 now points to a larger move.

items.title: Bitcoin tests $80,000 as Asia’s bid fades and Hong Kong AI IPOs surge
items.summary: Western desks are carrying the bitcoin rally alone, with Friday’s jobs report the next test.

items.title: Stablecoin proposal still ‘falls short’ of protecting bank deposits: US banks
items.summary: US Senator Thom Tillis said the current text of the CLARITY Act offers a compromise for the crypto industry and banks and provides a bipartisan path for the bill’s passage.

items.title: Haun Ventures raises $1B, adding AI to crypto focus
items.summary: Haun Ventures founder Katie Haun said AI will “increasingly begin to conduct economic activity on our behalf," and services will need to adapt for that world.

items.title: Western Union begins USDPT stablecoin rollout on Solana
items.summary: Western Union is one of several remittance companies that announced stablecoin plans after the US passed the stablecoin-friendly GENIUS Act in July.

items.title: GameStop's $55.5 billion eBay takeover bid puts its $368 million bitcoin stash in the crosshairs
items.summary: The video game retailer’s proposed acquisition plan revives question on whether its $368 million bitcoin stash could be sold to fund the expansion.

items.title: Hut 8 swaps Coinbase loan for cheaper FalconX deal, slashing borrowing costs as it bets big on AI
items.summary: A new $200 million, 364-day bitcoin-backed facility replaces the Coinbase Credit arrangement, cutting debt costs by 200 basis points.

items.title: Circle, Coinbase lead crypto stocks rally amid Clarity Act progress, bitcoin hitting $80,000
items.summary: The market is starting to price in potential winners as stablecoin yield compromise opens path for passing key U.S. digital asset regulation, one analyst said.

items.title: The government should promote innovation, not punish it
items.summary: District Attorney of Sacramento County, Ho argues that ambiguous rules and enforcement practices, such as those for crypto, lead to confusion, rather than seeking clarity in the law to further growth.

items.title: Shopify and National Bank of Canada are among backers of a new digital currency built to settle trades 24/7
items.summary: Tetra Trust's new stablecoin, CADD, is aimed at institutional use for 24/7 cross-border settlement, real-time corporate treasury, and direct fintech transfers, replacing legacy batch systems.
